description_long: This is a life-sized, realistic chicken with a plump, rounded body covered in light brown and tan feathers, featuring subtle shading and a natural feather texture. Its head is adorned with a prominent pink single comb and matching wattles, while the beak is short and pale yellow. The chicken's wings are tucked against its sides, and its tail feathers are slightly fanned and darker at the tips. Its legs are sturdy, scaly, and yellow, ending in three forward-facing toes and one rear toe, each tipped with a claw. The eyes are small, round, and dark, giving the chicken a lifelike and alert expression.
description: A realistic, plump brown chicken with a pink comb, tucked wings, and yellow legs, featuring detailed feather textures and natural coloration.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the chicken's body, wing, and tail feathers.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the chicken's face, comb, wattles, and both legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile, with clear visibility of the beak and eye.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail feathers and back, with legs visible from behind.
